zh-CN.brandSub: 非官方新生资料助手示例
zh-CN.disclaimer: 这是公开脱敏示例，不是大学官方平台。重要事项请以官方通知为准。
zh-CN.chatEmpty: 可以询问入学注册、课程与专业、宿舍、签注、校园账号、校园信息和香港生活。

zh-HK.brandSub: 非官方新生資料助手示例
zh-HK.disclaimer: 這是公開脫敏示例，不是大學官方平台。重要事項請以官方通知為準。
zh-HK.chatEmpty: 可以查詢入學註冊、課程與專業、宿舍、簽注、校園帳號、校園資訊和香港生活。

en.disclaimer: This is a public desensitized example, not an official university platform. Always verify important matters with official notices.
en.chatEmpty: Ask about admission, courses, residence, endorsement, campus accounts, campus information, and Hong Kong life.

routingModes.course_engine: Structured programme/course engine for precise course-like questions.
routingModes.hybrid: Combine structured engine output with RAG evidence when both are useful.

embedding.migrationRecommendation: Keep the current model unless a benchmark shows better answer quality after full re-embedding.

deploymentShape.frontend: Cloudflare Pages or static Next export from app/
deploymentShape.storage: R2 or compatible object storage for production uploads
deploymentShape.database: Supabase Postgres with pgvector for production retrieval
